'''Preela Dorat''' was the daughter of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Chel Dorat]]. Her mother died when Preela was very young, and her father was often away on naval business, so Preela was raised by the family's servants and [[Nanny droid/Legends|nanny droids]].<ref name="Loyalties" />

[[File:Chel_and_Preela_Dorat.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Preela Dorat confronts her [[Chel Dorat|father]]]]

She was spoiled and bullied those under her social status and was pleasant and charming towards powerful and influential people. She was fiercely loyal to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and when her father decided to defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], she, hoping to win the family fortune and gaining favor with the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]], turned him in and joined forces with the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] in an attempt to capture him.<ref name="Loyalties" />

==Personality and traits==
She was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and had dark red hair which was typically arranged in elaborate styles. She also wore very expensive and stylish clothes.<ref name="Loyalties" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Loyalties}} {{1st}}
